highlights.text: Burj Khalifa & top-tier Dubai Mall luxury shopping
Private desert oasis with falconry & gourmet dinner
Private yacht cruise & Palm Jumeirah spa retreat
Old Dubai heritage & gold souks cultural immersion

itinerary.title: Luxury Dubai Tour
itinerary.tagline: Dubai • Burj Khalifa • Desert Oasis • Private Yacht • Palm Jumeirah
itinerary.overview: Indulge in the zenith of opulence with TRAGUIN's curated luxury Dubai escape. Designed for the discerning traveler, this journey blends futuristic metropolitan glamour with serene coastal sanctuaries — with exclusive experiences, handpicked hotels, and unforgettable memories.
itinerary.seo_description: Ultra-luxury 06 Nights / 07 Days Dubai package (UAE-004): Burj Al Arab, private desert oasis, yacht cruise, Palm Jumeirah spa, and Old Dubai heritage.

days.title: Arrival in Dubai
days.description: Your TRAGUIN luxury escape begins with a VIP chauffeur service. Experience true opulence from the moment you land, followed by a private transfer to your handpicked hotel.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP chauffeur airport reception, private hotel transfer
Overnight Stay: Dubai (Burj Al Arab / Armani Hotel)
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: Metropolitan Luxury
days.description: Visit the iconic Burj Khalifa and experience top-tier luxury shopping at the Dubai Mall. A curated experience to admire the city's breathtaking landscapes.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall luxury shopping experience
Overnight Stay: Dubai (Burj Al Arab / Armani Hotel)
Meals Included: Breakfast

days.title: Desert Oasis Experience
days.description: A private desert oasis experience. Indulge in exclusive experiences like a private falconry display and a gourmet dinner under the stars amidst breathtaking landscapes.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private desert oasis, falconry display, gourmet dinner
Overnight Stay: Dubai (Burj Al Arab / Armani Hotel)
Meals Included: Breakfast & Gourmet Desert Dinner

days.title: Private Yacht Cruise
days.description: Savor the scenic beauty of the Dubai skyline with a private luxury yacht cruise. An immersive experience that defines our premium stays in Dubai.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private luxury yacht cruise
Overnight Stay: Dubai (Burj Al Arab / Armani Hotel)
Meals Included: Breakfast

days.title: Palm Jumeirah Retreat
days.description: Relax at an iconic attraction — the Palm Jumeirah. Enjoy a spa day and world-class dining, creating unforgettable memories in ultimate luxury.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Palm Jumeirah spa day
Evening Experience: World-class dining
Overnight Stay: Dubai (Burj Al Arab / Armani Hotel)
Meals Included: Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Culture & Heritage
days.description: Discover old Dubai and the gold souks. This immersive experience contrasts with the modern city, showcasing the rich history of a premium Dubai experience.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Old Dubai heritage tour, gold souks visit
Overnight Stay: Dubai (Burj Al Arab / Armani Hotel)
Meals Included: Breakfast

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN chauffeur transfer, concluding your luxury Dubai holiday.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP chauffeur airport transfer
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast

inclusions.text: 06 Nights in ultra-luxury hotel in Dubai
Burj Khalifa and Dubai Mall luxury experience
Private desert oasis with falconry display and gourmet dinner
Palm Jumeirah spa day and Old Dubai heritage tour
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated luxury travel concierge support
International airfare and UAE entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
